productDisplayName: Puma Women Trekkies Ska Target Oc White Casual Shoes
description: With a name like Tekkie, you'd think these shoes were for pocket-protected rocket scientists or that maybe they had actual rockets in them. Well, no. Tekkie is slang for running shoes in parts of Africa where people can run really fast in bare feet. So, on second thought, maybe these shoes are kind of high-octane after all. puma Tekkies shoes will take your breath away.UpperComfortable canvas upperFrayed collar for that worn-in lookTonal four-eye lace-up frontStitched formstripe detailMidsoleCanvas lining with plaid-printed footbedLow-profile rubber midsoleOutsoleGum-rubber outsole for traction
